/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/camera-viewer.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/camera-viewer.dir/camera-viewer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/camera-viewer.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/camera-viewer.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/camera-viewer.dir/controlclient.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/camera-viewer.dir/discoveryclient.cpp.o" -o camera-viewer  /usr/lib/libQt6MultimediaWidgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
